languages.text: "Вольно! Дворец взят. Наши враги гниют. Слава Богу-Императору!"

traits.locale_text: "Вольно! Дворец взят. Наши враги гниют. Слава Богу-Императору!"

languages.text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"
languages.original_text: "Вольно! Дворец взят. Наши враги гниют. Слава Богу-Императору!"

traits.locale_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"
"At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"
"At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

languages.text: "Rühren! Der Palast ist besetzt. Unsere Feinde verrotten. Ruhm dem Gottimperator!"
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Rühren! Der Palast ist besetzt. Unsere Feinde verrotten. Ruhm dem Gottimperator!"

languages.text: “稍息！宫殿已被攻下。我们的敌人横尸腐朽。荣耀归于神皇！”
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: “稍息！宫殿已被攻下。我们的敌人横尸腐朽。荣耀归于神皇！”

languages.text: « Repos ! Le palais est à nous, et nos ennemis gisent à nos pieds. Gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu ! »
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: « Repos ! Le palais est à nous, et nos ennemis gisent à nos pieds. Gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu ! »

languages.text: «¡Descansen! El palacio ha sido capturado. Nuestros enemigos están criando malvas. ¡Gloria al Dios Emperador!».
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Descansen! El palacio ha sido capturado. Nuestros enemigos están criando malvas. ¡Gloria al Dios Emperador!».

languages.text: "Rahat! Saray ele geçirildi. Düşmanlarımız çürümeye terk edildi. Tanrı İmparator'a şükürler olsun!"
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Rahat! Saray ele geçirildi. Düşmanlarımız çürümeye terk edildi. Tanrı İmparator'a şükürler olsun!"

languages.text: 「落ち着け！宮殿は陥落した。敵は腐敗している。神皇帝に栄光あれ！」
languages.original_text: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 「落ち着け！宮殿は陥落した。敵は腐敗している。神皇帝に栄光あれ！」
